    • This website gives you links to podcasts starting #101 from the weekly Study Group,

      where Building Love That Lasts / Radiant Joy Brilliant Love

      is read and discussed, with questions posed and answered by the author.

      In addition, the skill-building Experiments which the author suggests during the Study Group are added for each session.

    • Love already lasts. It is fear and confusion that force you to leave love behind.

      Here is how to become an initiated adult from Archiarchy who sources Love in your life and in the world.

      ----------

      "Clinton Callahan is an original thinker."

      ŌĆō- Marilyn Ferguson

      The Aquarian Conspiracy,

      Aquarius Now,

      Brain-Mind Bulletin Editor

      "A rare book that will definitely wake you up. It's a must for those seriously interested in the path of conscious relationship."

      --John Welwood

      Journey of the Heart

      Perfect Love, Imperfect Relationships

       Love and Awakening

      Toward A Psychology of Awakening

      "For modern seekers, responding to the call for initiation into relationship, here is an open invitation."

      --Malidoma Some

      Of Water and the Spirit

      Building Love...

    • Building Love That Lasts Book Reviews

      I'VE NEVER BEEN MORE BENEFICIALLY INFLUENCED BY A BOOK THAN BY THIS ONE

      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Reviewed in Canada on July 21, 2020

      Verified Purchase

      After encountering Clinton and Possibility Management online, and experiencing the effect of the distinctions offered, I bought this book as well as buying Conscious Feelings. I have bought so many books in my life to help me heal, grow, and live a more extraordinary lifeŌĆ”and sure, they have helped me. But this bookŌĆ”this bookŌĆ”is by far and away NEXT LEVEL. My world is changing, I am changingŌĆ”in ways I have for my whole life hoped and dreamed might be possible. If I could dream it, surely that meant I could BE IT?! Yes, it is so, and this book, and the Possibility Management community of edge workers are bringing me the possibilities.

      - Nicole Hartley Bradford

      NOT JUST FOR PARTNER RELATIONSHIPS

      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Reviewed in the United States on January 14, 2008

      Although the subtitle suggests that this book is for people who want to build a more satisfying relationship with a partner (and it is that), the book actually provides fundamentally new ways for creating and being in any relationship. Typically we entrap ourselves in a well-defended box made of unchallenged ideas, opinions, and values imposed upon us by our culture and peers. Relationships between boxes are what the author refers to as "ordinary human relationship," and it's the only kind of relationship most of us ever know. While the book alerts the reader to the existence of two higher levels of relationship (extraordinary and Archetypal) and guides him or her to those higher levels, a browser can gain substantive value by simply opening the book and reading a few pages at random. It's hard to avoid a new idea, an inspirational anecdote, or a challenging exercise that crawls its way into your psyche. But be forewarned. This is a dangerous book. On the back cover there's a disclaimer in a highlighted box that says, "Warning: You will not work with this book--this book works with you. This book is filled with memetic viruses--ideas that swarm through every level of your thinking, replacing any ideas they find that are formulated with less clarity. Your mind will not digest this book. This book digests your mind. If you do not want your present ideas about relationship seriously reordered, do not read this book." Take it seriously.

      - N. Lewis

      CHOOSE TO LOVE, CHOOSE TO GROW, TAKE RESPONSIBILITY

      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Reviewed in the United States on June 4, 2010

      A powerful Instrument for learning love by doing exactly what its reviewers claimed. You won't digest this book, it will digest you. Reading it is like importing a computer virus that replaces everything in your hard drive regarding love that was wishy-washy and full of victimhood and installs clarity and personal responsibility. The light is so bright it may hurt your eyes. Clinton Callahan establishes a new "possibility" language that builds on and synthesizes previous psychological models and creates powerful new personal growth tools for self and relationship. This book is the closest thing to a manual of Awareness and Awakening that I have ever encountered. There is no where to hide from yourself after you've read this book. If you read it, you will share it with everyone who is important to you and use the concepts and experiments revealed every day for the rest of your blessed life.

      - PDM

      I THOUGHT THIS BOOK WAS FOR OTHER PEOPLE

      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Reviewed in the United States on January 25, 2008

      I have been happily married for 33 years. Many of my friends and acquaintances have not. They are divorced, some several times. They are unhappy and unsatisfied in their current relationships. They have resigned themselves to an "OK" relationship, but the passion and energy for joining together with their partner in a deeper and vibrant life died long ago. When I heard someone talk about Radiant Joy Brilliant Love, I thought that the book was for them, the unhappy people, not for me. I already had a good relationship. My partnership was full of life. But, this book is explosive! It has given me so many new ideas for looking at my life and my relationship in vital ways that I never imagined before. I am so grateful for the serious time I've devoted to this challenging but rewarding book. I highly recommend it to anyone in a partnered relationship, even--perhaps especially--if they think their current relationship is as good as it can get.

      - Leela R.

      NEXT LEVEL RELATIONSHIP BOOK - HIGHLY RECOMMEND

      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Reviewed in the United States on September 11, 2019

      Verified Purchase

      Unbelievable relationship book. Clinton Callahan is a true thought pioneer and a brilliant writer. This is the single most powerful relationship book I have ever come across. I highly recommend it!

      - H. Keeling

      AMAZING BOOK! BEST I'VE READ IN A LONG TIME - AND I READ A LOT!

      5.0 out of 5 stars

      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on November 28, 2013

      Verified Purchase

      This book will take you on an amazing journey...teaching you to how live in the present, disengage from your inner gremlin and be capable of the highest love.
      It touches on deep issues between men & women...how to be fully responsible for your life. There is no 'new age' advice - its all firm, practical, down to earth stuff. Nothing wrong with new age...but Clinton comes from the practical side.
      I loved the book and I loved his writing style.
      Buy it, buy it and get your friends to buy it too.

      - Bob S.

    • a story of a book...

      Hohm Press in Arizona published Clinton Callahan's manuscript as Radiant Joy Brilliant Love in 2007 (ISBN-13: ŌĆÄ 978-1890772727). By 2019 this edition was sold out. The publisher wished to re-issue the book with a new ISBN number (ISBN-13: ŌĆÄ 978-1942493549), a new cover design, and re-titled as: Building Love That Lasts. Clinton wanted to add in the Matrix Codes for each of the book's powerful Experiments so that readers can register their Matrix Points in the StartOver.xyz game. All this has been accomplished keeping the contents of both books essentially the same.

      HOHM PRESS

    • Weekly Study Group Podcasts

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #101

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-101

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. ALLOW YOURSELF TO BE AMAZED EVERY DAY.

      2. ASK FOR A MEMETIC ENGINEERING PROCESS. If a construct is still at the center of your life after doing several EHPŌĆÖs, this will allow you to leave your construct.

      3. COMMUNICATE WITH THE BLTL TEAM WHEN ISSUES COME UP, WHILE EXPLORING THE ARCHETYPAL DOMAIN. This is a journey we are on together.

      4. ONE MUST FEEL ALL FOUR FEELINGS IN ORDER TO BE IN AN ARCHETYPAL SPACE INCLUDING A RELATIONSHIP. Do not mistake the archetypal for being in bliss.

      5. TRANSFORM YOUR GREMLIN & KEEP HER/HIM BY YOUR SIDE. You need a transformed gremlin by your side in order to be in extraordinary and archetypal spaces. Managing the ordinary is not the path to the extraordinary. In the archetypal, the gremlin needs to be leashed, completely awake, and taking full responsibility.

      6. TAKE RADICAL RESPONSIBILITY FOR WHERE YOUR X IS ON THE MAP. In this space you will not take things personally. Shift and relocate your point of origin into the archetypal.

      7. ONCE A DAY CAST YOUR POINT OF ORIGIN INTO THE ARCHETYPAL. Step out of bed in the morning and declare that you are relocating your point of origin into the archetypal. Take your point of origin and cast it into the air and see where it lands.

      8. INTRODUCE YOURSELF TO STRANGERS FROM AN ARCHETYPAL DOMAIN. Hello, I am a transformational alchemist, I am a memetic engineer, etc. Stay in the archetypal for as long as you can.

      9. MAKE AWE YOUR NEW HOME & IMPROVISE. In the archetypal you will not know what to do, and will speak or act what is alive in you right now.

      10. STAND IN A SPACE AS IF THE KINGDOM IS AT HAND, particularly when you are in scarcity, not fitting in, or in conflict. If you bring that forward and stand in the space of the kingdom at hand, your priorities will change. Will you turn away into victim or rage, or walk towards the door of the kingdom, The Ancient One?

      11. THANK PEOPLE FOR GIVING YOU THE OPPORTUNITY TO SHIFT INTO THE EXTRAORDINARY, particularly when their gremlins have attempted to hook you, blame you, or??

      After listening to the entire recording, enter the Matrix Code: NCRADIO3.03 for StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #102

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-102

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. PRACTICE COMING FROM THE UNKNOWN & THE SMALL NOW, with no script when speaking or doing. If you create a script of what you want to say or do, you are not in the unknown.

      2. NOTICE WHEN OTHERS ARE USING REASONS. Ask yourself, what is the value of these reasons? Identify the way you and other people use reasons. Are your reasons a defense, a justification, or to hide? We give away our power when we give reasons. http://tarbabyprocess.mystrikingly.com

      3. TAKE YOUR POWER BACK, & TAKE A STEP TOWARDS BEING A CONSCIOUS ASSHOLE.http://gounreasonable.mystrikingly.com http://theworthyhealers.mystrikingly.com http://gononlinear.mystrikingly.com

      3. DO THE RED CLOTH EXPERIMENT. Create a being to being connection with a person who is trapped in a world of constructs and thought forms. Hold a red flag to your side so that their constructs do not affect you. You can now stay in the being to being connection and enjoy it.

      4. USE YOUR SWORD OF CLARITY AND HOLD IT TO A PERSONS THROAT. http://memeticengineering.mystrikingly.com http://memetics.mystrikingly.com http://vaccumrapidlearning.mystrikingly.com

      5. REMIND YOURSELF TO KNOW WHAT YOUR PURPOSE IS WHEN RELATING TO OTHERS.

      6. PRACTICE SOURCING LOVE, FRIENDSHIP & SEX IN THE EXTRAORDINARY. Love, Friendship and Sex are not scarce in this world. It is up to you to source them. Archetypal relating is not about me, it serves the world as both a transformer or transducer.

      Movies:

      Dave with Kevin Kline & The Bank Of Dave (English movie)

      Watch the Zombie movies in order.

      #1 World War Z #2 Zombieland #3 Warm Bodies

      http://5offers.mystrikingly.com

      http://demonslayer.mystrikingly.com

      http://gameworldconsulting.mystrikingly.com

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #103

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-103

      EXPERIMENTS:

       1. WHEN SHAME IS PRESENT, ASK YOURSELF OR OTHERS TO TELL YOU ABOUT THE FEAR, SADNESS, & ANGER THAT IS UNDERNEATH SHAME. Shame will not change the behavior, feeling the remorse, (sadness) will. Say, I am going to walk through the door with you to distinguish conscious remorse and understand how you created this. Behavior does not change until we feel the remorse. Let remorse get full blown and say, ŌĆ£I created thisŌĆØ. Then grieve it and this will transform you.

      2. PUT A SPOTLIGHT ON SHAME. Make a gesture with your arms in a V above your head, guiding the spotlight on shame. Speak what you are ashamed of and have fun with it. The habit and heaviness of going to shame is gone. Playfulness Interrupts everything.

      3. GATHER WITH A FEW PEOPLE & TAKE TURNS SPEAKING ABOUT THE SHAME PRESENT IN YOUR BODY. Notice the feelings of fear, anger and sadness that are underneath. Share what you are feeling and where it comes from. Ask others if they have experienced this or know others who have. When you speak about shame, it often melts away. We think we are alone in our shame, when most often others have experienced something similar.

      4. STUDY THE MAP OF THREE KINDS OF LOVE. Ordinary love is where love is scarce, and contains lots of gremlin food which is dependent on certain circumstances or feelings. Extraordinary love is respectful, playful, and alive in the present moment. You source love happening in each moment so love cannot be missing. Archetypal love is where love is the most abundant thing in the universe. It is impersonal and not about you. You are not in each others bubble. http://evolutionofrelating.mystrikingly.com

      5. SPEAK ABOUT WHAT SEEMS UNSPEAKABLE. Experience the unspeakable first, and then you are able to speak about it. Inhabit the archetypal domain while speaking. Check out the experiments on this site: http://experientialreality.mystrikingly.com

      6. USE WORDS TO PAINT AN EXPERIENCE INTO ANOTHER PERSONS BODY. Stay there and know this is experiential reality.

      7. NOTICE THE SHIFT OF SPACE & THE GAPS IN-BETWEEN. Minimize your now so you can go through the gap between spaces. Practice shifting out of spaces you donŌĆÖt want to be in, and into spaces you want to be in.http://navigatespace.mystrikingly.com When there is nothing in the gap, everything is possible.

      8. THE PRINCESS BRIDE IS A MUST WATCH. Great acting, and brilliantly written. A great example of non-linear speaking.

      9. WRITE ABOUT ARCHETYPAL LOVE THIS WEEK. Sit down and allow archetypal love to write about itself. What is it, and what is scary about it?

      10. THINK ABOUT HOW A PERSON CAN CREATE NECESSITY. Then write it down.

      11. WHAT CREATES THE RIGNT TIME FOR YOU TO GAIN THE SKILLS FOR EXPLORING ARCHETYPAL LOVE? Write down what this might look like for you.

      12. PRACTICE BUILDING MATRIX INTO YOUR BEING, SO THAT YOUR LIFE BELONGS TO LIFE FORCES INSTEAD OF YOUR BOX. When you are in action, it is your being that is in action. http://ecco.mystrikingly.com, http://yourbeing.mystrikingly.com, http://buildmatrix.mystrikingly.com

      13. LOOK AT THE WEBSITES MENTIONED, & DO SOME OF THE EXPERIMENTS ON THE WEBSITES.

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #104

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-104

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. ASK YOURSELF, WHO WOULD I BE RIGHT NOW IF I HAD NOT BEEN ABUSED. What got buffered in you. Start with I amŌĆ”.and write who you would be right now without the abuse.

      http://evolutionofrelating.mystrikingly.com http://yourbubbleofspace.mystrikingly.com
      http://4feelings.mystrikingly.com http://4emotions.mystrikingly.com
      http://4brains.mystrikingly.com http://rageclub.mystrikingly.com

      2. CREATE A GAME PLAN FOR YOURSELF AS YOU TAKE ACTION. Your game plan is something that is happening now. When other things come in your direction, if you do not have a game plan you can be distracted and loose many days away from the direction of your game plan. Be a person of agency. http://yourgameplan.mystrikingly.com http://personofagency.mystrikingly.comhttp://achetypallineage.mystrikingly.com
      3. NOTICE YOUR INNER STRUCTURE, THEN FIND THE WEEDS & LEAKS. Clean it out, removing buttons, triggers, and traumas. This will allow you to be present and connected. Ask yourself, what does not work for me anymore? Make your inner construct affective and functional. Notice your common scenarios. What could be the scenario of, I am not loved and noticed? Create freedom of movement. http://memeticconstruct.mystrikingly.com http://memetics.mystrikingly.comhttp://memeticengineering.mystrikingly.com http://innerstructure.mystrikingly.com

      4. NAVIGATE TO STORYLESSNESS. You can do this by letting the story go as soon as you finish it. You can then create another story, and also let it go as soon as completed.

      5. LEAD YOUR INTERACTIONS WITH FEAR IN ORDER TO DETECT LOW DRAMA. When low drama happens, just notice it. http://compassofreality.mystrikingly.com

      6. CHECK OUT THE WEEKLY FEELINGS PRACTITIONER CLINIC FOR ANOTHER POINT OF VIEW ABOUT LOW DRAMA. feelingspractioner.org

      7. GET RID OF THE PARASITES IN THE SPACE. This is survival strategy, creating low drama. Intentionally change the space to the extraordinary. One does this by becoming unhookable, and then source what turns you on. You can also watch the low drama and see how it works, what triggers it, how it spreads to others, and what is gained from it. You do this to see what the parasite is, what the motive is, and what the opportunity is. You change the environment with this awareness. http://asisprocess.mystrikingly.com/http://radicalsimplicity.mystrikingly.com http://reactivity.mystrikingly.comhttp://becomeunhookable.mystrikingly.com http://boxtechnology.mystrikingly.com
      http://infiniteresources.mystrikingly.com

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #105

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-105

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. HAVE A FORMAL CELEBRATION FOR WHERE YOUR X IS, (your presence) ON THE MAP. These are your successes. Have a formal celebration 3 times this week where you start by talking about your successes. You arenŌĆÖt worried about getting it wrong. You can depend on playing full out because ECCO will take you where you need to go. How would your life be different if you lived full out? Read spark #80 Intimacy Heals Denial

      2. WATCH THE 1ST, 3RD & 4TH INDIANA JONES MOVIES. Then use the knowledge from the movie to shift your idea called freak-out into an adventure. You can say my box is on an adventure instead of my box is freaking out, which comes from the child state of being.

      3.TAKE YOUR ROLE AS A HUMAN BEING & PRACTICE RELATING IN THE ARCHETYPAL DOMAIN.ECCO wants you to succeed in this domain. This empowers you to ask dangerous questions, make boundaries, create possibilities, say what you want, build new game worlds, inhabit them, and invite others to inhabit them. This is worth celebrating. http://declaring.mystrikingly.com, https://3powers.mystrikingly.com https://cavitatespace.mystrikingly.comyoutu.be/qpuHsxMrPGQ

      4. EACH TIME YOU HAVE A SENSE OF HOW TO STEP INTO THE ARCHETYPAL, JUST SAY YES & THEN DO IT. Even if you get feedback that it isnŌĆÖt working, try something new until you get it to work. Take the steps and actions that are in front of you right now, until you can reach the open door. Do this instead of making plans and thinking about what to do next.

      5. CREATE YOUR OWN STORY WORLD, with your own purpose, and consciously declare by saying ŌĆ£it is soŌĆØ, then consciously declare the purpose of the space. Cavitate new space where archetypal work thrives. Step into the bubble and invite others in. https://3powers.mystrikingly.com https://declaring.mystrikingly.com

      6.PRACTICE USING THE ART FORM OF NAVIGATING SPACE by noticing your physical sensations, and energetic body. Then notice what is happening when you are navigating spaces. What direction are you headed? What is your purpose in the space? What are the purposes of others for being in the space?

      7. KEEP THE FOLLOWING THREE FORCES ALIVE WHEN NAVIGATING SPACE 1.Sustainer of the space (keeps curiosity going) 2. Accelerators of the space (affirming others) 3. Deniers of the space (allow the denyingforces in your space, and say Yes andŌĆ”..).

      8. CONSCIOUSLY CHOOSE TO SERVE A SPACE WITH YOUR HEART. The space chooses what is possible.

      9. WHEN YOU HAVE A STORY, ASK YOURSELF WHAT IS MY PURPOSE FOR HAVING THIS STORY? Is it to take responsibility or avoid it? To Expand my consciousness, or avoid it?

      Movies: Doctor Strange

      After listening to the entire recording, enter the Matrix Code: NCRADIO3.10 for StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #106

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-6

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. READ THE POEM, Dirge With Certainty by Clinton Callahan, around Page 257 in BLTL.

      2. PRACTICE LETTING YOUR GREMLIN BE BIGGER THAN YOU THINK IT IS, & bigger than the other persons gremlin. The point is not to fight, but to own the other gremlin with awareness, and without stories.

      3. WHICH TYPE OF GREMLIN ARE YOU? Your type of gremlin is how you manage and suppress your craziness. Type one gremlin, uses gremlin as a primary weapon. Something comes up, it becomes a problem, gremlin reacts, argues, and can be vindictive. Type two is to be seen as a safe, nice person that fits in. When gremlin comes up for type 2 it is suppressed and locked away in the corner to assure that we are not classified as a bad person, or a person that doesnŌĆÖt fit into the group. http://gremlintype2.mystrikingly.com https://type1.mystrikingly.com https://gremlinreconstruction.mystrikingly.com

      4. DO A RETRIEVAL PROCESS OF SUPPRESSED, OUT OF CONTROL, GREMLIN, bringing him back into the world. Let certainty fall off and craziness allowed back in. Down In The Black Gang (book)

      5. TELL YOUR GREMLIN TO CATCH HIMSELF, & REPORT TO YOU BEFORE HE STRIKES.. Can you catch your gremlin? Nobody else can. Pump up your gremlin with energetic intention to have a big awareness of your gremlin.

      6.CULTIVATE THE BROKEN HEART BY MOVING INTO THE DEFENDED SPACE, your prison, acting as your defense mechanism. You can outgrow these defenses and move into the extraordinary, by relating with your broken heart. You will know you are there when pain about your own unconscious behavior wakes you up, and you care too much about the other being to interact in a non-responsible way. When you are radically honest, you move by your bright principles and become transparent.

      7. DO THE 50 LEVELS DOWN PROCESS. Stop everything & put your messes on the table with another, then speak about them. This is not low drama. You feel sadness at each level, and then go one level deeper, 50 times. Choose someone you do not know well, or someone who you have not felt heard by (not family). Consider having a coach so there is no victim mode, or getting off topic.

      After listening to the entire recording, enter the Matrix Code: NCRADIO3.11 for StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #107

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-107

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. THINK OF PAST FAILURES, PARTICULARLY AROUND CONNECTING WITH ANOTHER. Consider these failures as steps and opportunities on your path of evolution.

      2. BE SPECIFIC ABOUT WHAT IS GOING ON, instead of using the words like low drama.

      3. PRACTICE SELF OBSERVATION, & NOTICE HOW YOU KILL YOUR ALIVENESS, when you abuse yourself with self talk.(from parents, school, societal norms). Notice how this self talk affects your reality. Split your attention with one part outside your box, looking at you to notice what is happening just before the story starts. Self observation sees more accurately what is going on. Do not make judgments or opinions.

      4. PRACTICE LOOKING AT YOUR BRIGHT PRINCIPLES & VALUES. When you do this, kill the under world self talk.

      5. NOTICE HOW & WHEN YOU START TO SHINE, and what percentage you are shining when you shut it down. Then practice shining 60% of the time. Watch the movie As Good As It Gets with Jack Nicholson. Set a timer on your watch and when it goes off practice shining. You can start by complimenting people in an authentic way.

      6. GO TO YOUR EDGE & STAY THERE FOR AS LONG AS YOU CAN. Ask a person to hold space for a certain amount of time, so you can get through the doubts and fears. This person will have your back. This is where the extraordinary happens!

      7. SPEND SEVEN MINUTES A DAY BEING GLAD ABOUT BEING YOUR AUTHENTIC SELF.

      8. DISARM YOUR PROTECTIVE LAND MINES FOR ONE OR TWO HOURS TO START WITH. Increase as time goes on.

      9. PRACTICE NOTICING WHERE YOUR ATTENTION GOES. Where your attention goes, the energy flows. Your attention is your consciousness.

      10. PRACTICE OFFERING CONNECTION & LOVING INTERACTIONS WITH YOUR PARTNER. Use team work rather than through your assumptions and expectations. Now you can reserve the bulk of your attention for appreciating being with an archetypal partner.

      11. PRACTICE APPLYING YOUR INTENTION TO YOUR ATTENTION. Where our inattention goes, our energy flows. Place this attention on your partner. 1000 distractions feed on you by sucking your energy when you donŌĆÖt pay attention, worries, secrets, withholding feelings, over-reacting, beliefs, avoiding unpleasant tasks, having conversations in your head, uncompleted agreements, power struggles with authority figures, being right, complaining, messes).

      12. NOTICE & WRITE DOWN THE DIFFERENT PLACES YOUR ATTENTION GOES, & YOUR ENERGY FLOWS. DonŌĆÖt judge yourself or try and change it right now. Notice and think about who you will be with that extra energy.

      After listening to the entire recording, enter the Matrix Code: NCRADIO3.12 for StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #108

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-108

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. NOTICE THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN A RIFTWALKER & AN EDGEWALKER. You must have access to the void to do this.. A rift-walker pulls the rug out, and works in the middle with chaos and disorder. This is where things tend to fall apart in order to create new possibilities and options. They work on an energetic level and you must be unhookable so that gremlin is not involved. http://riftwalkers.mystrikingly.com http://riftwalkers.mystrikingly.comhttp://3phasehealing.mystrikingly.com http://rulesofchaos.mystrikingly.com http://infiniteresources.mystrikingly.comhttp://personofagency.mystrikingly.com http://magetraining.mystrikingly.com

      2. FOR THE NEXT WEEK, TRACK WHERE YOUR ATTENTION DIRECTS YOUR ENERGY. This is neutral self observation. Just notice, do not try to change it. Notice how much energy is in the future or past. Awareness is being created by the energy flow of our intentions.

      3. FIND OUT WHAT IS TRYING TO GET YOUR ATTENTION, & THEN SEE WHAT IT FEELS LIKE. You can say ŌĆ£I notice you are trying to get my attention, you can not have it now.ŌĆØ Ask yourself ŌĆ£what am I doing with my resource called attention.ŌĆØ Your box is designed to evolve. http://yourattention.mystrikingly.com

      http://causeadventure.mystrikingly.com http://causetransformation.mystrikingly.com

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #109

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-109 

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. STOP BEATING YOURSELF UP! This prevents you from connecting with others in an extraordinary space.

      2. NOTICE THE FEAR IN YOUR BODY. Explore what you are afraid of, and what your fear is telling you. Go do that thing you are afraid of.undefined

      3. PRACTICE BEING AN AGENT OF SYNTHESIS. Do this for people who are warring together, projecting on each other, and hold space for them. Use chaos to synthesize opposing elements.undefined

      4. NOTICE IF YOU HAVE A LONE WOLF STRATEGY. If so then connect with each of your bodies, move towards interacting with others, and become a transformer. (look for Ingrids upcoming article about this)undefined

      5. READ ANNE-CHLOES ARTICLE, BEYOND REPAIR. Venture into the territory where a space is broken. This is the foundation of creating something new, and most likely a more extraordinary space. Get in touch with the new possibility domain, where intuitions, possibilities, and coincidence come from.

      6. ARCHIARCHY IS SOURCED BY WOMEN WHO ARE LOUD & JUICY. Dare to be loud and juicy!

      7. WOMEN, EXPRESS YOUR OUTRAGE & HATRED ABOUT WHAT HAS BEEN CREATED IN THE PATRIARCHY. Gather together, and rage about what others have done to you, what you have done to yourself. Then cross the line and say I will never go back. It is over. This is clarity. Feel the volcanic grief once you have crossed the line. Say I cannot loose my dignity or integrity anymore.

      8. WOMEN MUST SET THE BAR FOR MEN WITHOUT EXPECTATIONS. Be arrogant, support each other, and do not doubt yourself or wait for patriarchal permission. Place a new X on the map and never go back.

      9. FIND YOUR CLUSTER OF WOMEN WHO YOU CAN TELL ANYTHING TO. Build this cluster and find a way to feed it. Women do not keep secrets when it comes to the patriarchy. Go first to speak up for what you want and will not tolerate. build a network of women to support each other when relating to the patriarchy

      Listen to the previous recordings here: http://buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com


      The article: https://annechlodestremau.medium.com/beyond-repair-7-stages-of-women-bridging-men-to-archiarchy-710e2db777f8

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #110

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-110

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. MEN, LET YOUR SHIELDS DOWN & GO THROUGH THE PROPELLER BLADES. Become more present with women. Relate to them in an extraordinary and archetypal space. Death by patriarchy is a suicidal path for men. They loose their hearts and sensitivity. Men must step into a life with feelings,

      2. WOMEN, USE YOUR ANGER & TAKE TWO WEEKS TO WITHDRAW YOUR CONNECTIONS WITH MEN. This is how women can get unmeshed from men and the patriarchy. How much of your attention is going to men? Do you put men ahead of the women in your life?

      3. WOMEN, CONSCIOUSLY BE IN LOVE WITH OTHER WOMEN. Put your focus on women and notice their strength.

      4. WOMEN, STEP INTO THE SPACE OF ARCHIARCHY. Say, I cavitate new space in which archiarchy thrives. At this point you step out of patriarchy. This is where radical relating starts. it is up to you to hold space for archiarchy. Do this in all five bodies. Now you are in the flow of ECCO.

      5. PRACTICE OWNING YOUR ENERGETIC BODY. women make themselves small by not owning their energetic body. This is where clarity comes.


      Listen to the previous recordings here: http://buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #111

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-111

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. LET GO OF THE ŌĆ£ITŌĆÖS BROKENŌĆØ VOICE INSIDE YOU. This is your box strategy that is undermining your courage, your presence, your clarity, and your voice. Let your box freak out, name it, and then you can identify that this is the box. At this point you can put the poop on the table courageously.

      2. NOTICE YOUR ADDICTION TO ADRENALIN (arguing, being right or better than others). Practice cavitating an archiarchal space where radical responsibility is the norm.

      3. CLAIM YOUR CENTER BY DOING RAGE WORK.

      4. WOMEN, USE YOUR INNER MUSCLES TO BECOME THE SPACE HOLDER. When others are holding space, women are trained to join the space that is given. Become the space holder and create your own context.

      5. INVITE OTHERS TO JOIN YOUR SPACE. Your rage will tell you what you want. Your sadness will tell you what you are missing. Get back your center and create your boundaries. You must keep attention on your clear boundaries to know what you really want.

      6. SISTERS, STAND TOGETHER & CREATE MORE LIGHT TO WORK ON YOUR UNCONSCIOUS INCOMPETENCE. Be grateful for how bad you look, and look forward to supporting each other.

      7. TAKE A STAND TO BE A LIGHTHOUSE & DECLARE ARCHAN RELATING. Declare it to be so. It might feel lonely and scary at first.

      8. WOMEN, CONSIDER GOING INTO ELEMENTARY SCHOOLS, & TEACH GIRLS HOW TO SAY NO, CREATE BOUNDARIES, & TAKE CARE OF THEMSELVES,

      9. CONFRONT THE PATRIARCHY THAT IS WOVEN INTO YOURSELF. When you take a stand you might loose all your friends. You will notice that you will soon have friends commit to your own evolutionary path. You will become alive.

      10. COMMIT TO ARCHAN RELATING, and DonŌĆÖt look around to see who will take this stand with you. Be on the lookout for gremlin taking over. Instead of allowing gremlin revenge, put your anger about the patriarchy on the table. Do this consciously by calling another women and say what is true for you. Clean out the revenge in your system.

      11. PAY ATTENTION TO YOUR ATTENTION. What are the things that hook and consume your attention? Attention is needed for healing, love happening, and connection.

      Listen to the previous recordings here: http://buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com

      Your box is designed to evolve.

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #112

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-122

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. TALK ABOUT WHAT YOU HATE & WHAT YOU LOVE WITH PASSION. The Extremes give you permission to have passions in what looks like ordinary circumstances.

      2. WOMEN, STOP HATING MEN & THE PATRIARCHY. When you do this, You continue giving your attention and energy to men

      3. PRACTICE DECIDING WHERE YOU WANT YOUR ATTENTION TO GO. This is what you will create in your life. Then say "IŌĆÖm a sorceress of regenerative love."

      4. DO AS MANY EMOTIONAL HEALING PROCESSES AS YOU CAN. Make the distinction between an emotion, that should only last up to 3 minutes, versus feelings which are powered by present time in the small now. Do the work so you can make this distinction.

      5. PRACTICE HOLDING YOUR SWORD STEADY & SAY, "THIS CONVERSATION IS OVER", when the conversation is low drama.

      6. DO ASSHOLE TRAINING. Now say, ŌĆ£I decline your offer to communicate in a patriarchal context.ŌĆØ

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #113

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-113

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. NOTICE & ASK YOURSELF WHAT YOU ARE TRYING TO SUSTAIN. Be conscious about it, as this is where you will put your energy.

      2. ASK YOURSELF, WHAT WILL YOU BE DEFENDING THIS WEEK? Phase two of anger is making proposals. Do this with what you are, or have been defending.

      3. NOTICE WHEN YOU ARE FREAKING OUT WITH SELF DOUBT. This is a self numbing technique. Discover what feeling is underneath, then do #4.

      4. GET YOURSELF A SUPPORT GROUP OF SAME SEX PEOPLE. Contact them to tell them you are freaking out, and why. Receive support and clarity

      5. CATCH YOURSELF EVERY SINGLE TIME YOU MAKE AN ASSUMPTION.Withdraw it immediately from the space. You can now avoid the outcome of assumptions, which turn into expectations, which leads to resentments.

      6. NOTICE HOW LONG YOU CAN GO WITHOUT MAKING ASSUMPTIONS ABOUT ANYTHING. An assumption means, that you think you know and understand what another is saying, without asking questions or doing research with them.

      7. GO A FULL WEEK WITHOUT LYING. Use your fear to reveal the information that is missing.

      Listen to the previous recordings here: http://buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #114

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-114

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1.INVESTIGATE & PRACTICE ARCHAN RELATING WHICH INCLUDES RADICAL RESPONSIBILITY. Your are holding space that is about possibility. You are not fixing or understanding anyone.

      2. CHANGE YOUR THOUGHT CONSTRUCT THAT YOU ARE ŌĆ£IN A RELATIONSHIPŌĆØ. This is a term used in the patriarchy. Replace it with, ŌĆ£I am in a space where relating and creating possibility is happening.ŌĆØ The thought, IŌĆÖm in relationship, brings low drama, illusion, and expectations. This kills intimacy.

      3. PRACTICE ARCHAN RELATING. Invent an entirely new universe with the people you relate with. It will be a non-material, groundless, ongoing, inventing, in a space of possibility, while dancing with another in the same space, without trying to achieve a result.

      4. NAVIGATE TO BEING UNDEFENDED. Decide that your value and what you have to offer is more important than the connection you have with others. This is a journey of discovery.

      5. NOTICE YOUR SURVIVAL STRATEGY OF BEING DISJOINTED. Do the startover process Clinton describes in week 114 at 1hr 24 min. on Next Culture Radio. This is when you have created two parts. You might have a timid part, while the other part is strong and angry.

      Listen to the previous recordings here: http://buildinglovethatlasts.mystrikingly.com

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #115

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-115

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. WOMEN, EXPOSE & GET RID OF THE FAKE, UNSPOKEN, PINK BUBBLE OF SUPPORTING OTHER WOMEN. Start talking about your real feelings underneath such as: fear of being betrayed, competition, back stabbing and gossiping. Let go of the judgements and put the dirt on the table.

      2. WOMEN, PRACTICE TELLING A MAN WHERE HE CAN MEET YOU. You must figure this out for yourself first. What is your offer for intimacy? One possible offer: ŌĆ£if you want to be with me, you will need to change your purpose in relating from lying, to being caught in your secret life.ŌĆØ When you are caught, you reveal what is gong on with you honestly.

      3. LEARN SOMETHING NEW TO AN ABSURDLY EFFECTIVE LEVEL. This will change your whole nervous system, including the way you perceive and interact with others.

      4. MAKE A LIST OF WORDS & PHRASES THAT OCCUR WHEN LOW DRAMA IS PRESENT. You can now easily identify when low drama is occurring.

      5. REFUSE AN OFFER OF LOW DRAMA. You can be silent, walk away, say ŌĆ£I am not available to communicate in low dramaŌĆØ, or ŌĆ£This conversation is overŌĆØ. You can do something completely unexpected and outside the box.

      6. WOMEN, USE YOUR SWORD OF CLARITY & SAY NO, ESPECIALLY WHEN GREMLIN BEHAVIOR IN A MAN SHOWS UP. Do not keep it a secret, and do not try to be nice or take care of the man.

      7. WOMEN, WITH YOUR FEAR, IDENTIFY & PEEL OFF THE LAYERS OF GAMES THAT WOMEN PLAY WITH EACH OTHER.

      8. BE RADICALLY HONEST WITH OTHER WOMEN FOR ONE YEAR. Live with integrity: no stories, no arrogance, no comparing. Start with ŌĆ£IŌĆÖm afraid you will judge me, or expect something from me.ŌĆØ

      The Article:

      https://annechlodestremau.medium.com/beyond-repair-7-stages-of-women-bridging-men-to-archiarchy-710e2db777f8

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #116

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-116

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. RECOGNIZE THE VALUE OF INCOMPETENCE. Incompetence provides a doorway to new possibilities.

      2. EVERY TIME YOUR GREMLIN BEHAVIOR COMES UP, TRANSFORM IT. Memorize the following sentence when gremlin enters the conversation:" If you donŌĆÖt go through the doorway, this conversation is over."

      3. WOMEN, DO YOUR OWN IMPECCABILITY WORK, SO YOU CAN TAKE A STAND WITH THE PATRIARCHY. Impeccability includes fallibility, as long as you sincerely own it and do EHPŌĆÖs so your behavior doesnŌĆÖt happen again. This creates legitimacy for your demand that the patriarchy do his own impeccability work. This creates a foundation for relating in the archetypal domain.

      4. LEARN TO LIVE IN A PARALLEL CULTURE. You live in an Archan culture, and others live in a Zombie, patriarchal culture. There is an alertness living in Archan culture that allows you to Learn new ways to talk to zombies.

      5. CREATE A WOMENŌĆÖS DISCUSSION GROUP. Read and discuss the following article: Beyond Repair: 7 Stages Of Women Bridging Men To Archiarchy.

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #118

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-118

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. WHEN YOU HIT ROCK BOTTOM, PRACTICE STAYING THERE TO SEE WHAT IS STUCK THERE. Stay in this space until you can find your gremlin Joy, and explore what your gremlin is saying. Own it, and then let your gremlin coach you to change the voices.

      2. PRACTICE SAYING YES!. Doors are opened when a person has the courage to say yes.

      3. PRACTICE SPEAKING YOUR TRUTH TO A FAMILY MEMBER. This is how you learn how to tell the truth more often.

      4. PRACTICE FEELING YOUR FEAR, & NOTICE HOW ALIVE YOU FEEL!

      5. FIND A PARTNER & DO THE HEART PRACTICE. Speak from your heart (rather than your mind) everyday with this person for 2 weeks.

      6. GIVE & RECORD 3 WORK-TALKS IN 3 WEEKS. Come up with a first sentence, look at your audience, and speak from your heart about what is there for them to hear. If you canŌĆÖt think of a first sentence, ask your 3 cell team for possibilities.

      The Article: https://annechlodestremau.medium.com/beyond-repair-7-stages-of-women-bridging-men-to-archiarchy-710e2db777f8

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #119

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-119

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. WOMEN: PRACTICE HOLDING BACK NOTHING, OR ADAPTING TO NOTHING. Allow your body to speak without analyzing it.

      2. MEN, PRACTICE MATCHING THE TIMING OF WOMAN TALKING. This will help you slow down so you can hear what they are saying.

      3. MEN, PRACTICE BECOMING OK ABOUT BRING WRONG FOR A MONTH.

      4. WOMEN, PRACTICE RELATING TO YOURSELF 90% OF THE TIME WITH YOUR SWORD OF CLARITY, & YOUR BULLSHIT DETECTOR.

      5. PARENTS, RECALIBRATE YOUR COMPASS OF REALITY. The kids then get to see what boundaries are set, and what their parentŌĆÖs compass of reality looks like.

      The article: https://annechlodestremau.medium.com/beyond-repair-7-stages-of-women-bridging-men-to-archiarchy-710e2db777f8

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #120

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-120

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. ASK A FRIEND TO SUPPORT YOU IN A POOL, WHILE FLOATING ON YOUR BACK. Imagine welcoming yourself to this earth in a most loving, warm and compassionate way, as if you had just came out of the womb.

      2. STELLATE YOUR SADNESS FROM A BROKEN HEART. Once this is done, you can now participate in an archetypal relationship

      3. TAKE AWAY THE PROTECTION YOU HAVE BUILT UP AROUND YOUR HEART. This protection was created after your heart was broken. When you care too much about the being of another person, you cannot be insulted by their box.

      4. HIT ROCK BOTTOM, & STAY THERE ON PURPOSE. You will go through different layers of feelings about your broken heart. Speak about them to others when needed. This will unlock another part of your heart, allowing it to become more alive.

      5. NOTICE THE MOMENTS THAT ARE PURE JOY, (an animal playing, a child radiating love). Notice the feelings that come up, without allowing your brain to identify it in words. Notice the archetypal doors opening when this happens.

      Related Information:

      http://thoughtwarepress.mystrikingly.com

      http://archan.mystrikingly.com

      http://distinctionary.mystrikingly.com

      http://pmvillagemaker.mystrikingly.com

      http://hitbottom.mystrikingly.com

      Practice spaces: find all information for these practice spaces at the:

      PM Event Telegram group: https://t.me/pmeventsglobal.

      3-3-3 Team Practice

      Setting Boundaries

      StartOver Possibility Team

      Inner Structure Possibility Team

      Rage Club & Fear Club for BIPOC (black, indigenous, people of color)

      After listening to the entire recording, enter the Matrix Code: NCRADIO3.39 for StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #121

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-121

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. NOTICE THE LOVE THAT PEOPLE HAVE FOR YOU, & PRACTICE ALLOWING IT IN! It does not serve you to block this love.

      2. START AN UN-PACKAGING REVOLUTION. Have enough arrogance to be your own person, regardless if it is acceptable or not. Allow the in-authentic pieces of yourself to fall off, and notice what you are truly longing for. let your heart speak without the package.

      3. NOTICE WHERE YOUR ATTENTION FLOWS. THIS IS WHERE YOUR ENERGY GOES. Is your attention going to an unconscious place or a conscious place? Negative attention is gremlin food. When you put your authentic attention on a person, healing and transformation happens.

      4. LOOK AT THE WORTHING HEALERS WEBSITE. When you train your attention, it is very powerful.

      The Magician's Way: William Whitecloud
      King Arthur (film) from Guy Ritchie

      Related Websites:

      http://worthinghealers.mystrikingly.com

      http://thoughtwarepress.mystrikingly.com

      http://yourattention.mystrikingly.com

      http://archan.mystrikingly.com

      http://distinctionary.mystrikingly.com

      http://pmvillagemaker.mystrikingly.com

      http://hitbottom.mystrikingly.com

      https://spaceport.mystrikingly.com

      Practice Spaces: find all information for these practice spaces at the:

      PM Event Telegram group https://t.me/pmeventsglobal

      3-3-3

      Setting Boundaries

      StartOver Possibility Team

      Inner Structure Possibility Team

      Rage club & fear club for BIPOC (black, indigenous, people of color)

      After listening to this entire recording, please enter Matrix Code: NCRADIO_.__ in your free account at the StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #122

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-122

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. CREATE A NEW GROOVE FOR YOUR FEARS. Introduce your new groove to yourself. One example is if I move with my fear, I become vulnerable, and more authentic. My fear shows me how to be alive

      2. NOTICE THE COMMON THINGS THAT DEVOUR YOUR ENERGY. Do you live alone and have secrets? Do you have an opinion and not share it? Did you make an unfulfilled promise? Do you get distracted? You will have more energy to create, without these drains on your energy.

      3. SHIFT YOUR ATTENTION SO YOU TREAT EVERY WORD OUT OF THE OTHER PERSONS MOUTH, WITH LOVE & APPRECIATION.

      4. NEUTRALLY, TRACK WHERE YOUR ATTENTION IS GOING DURING THE DAY, & WHY. Do this for several months until you get sick of wasting your attention.

      5. LEARN TO MAKE YOUR ATTENTION HARD TO GET, (with the exception of your partner and kids). Focus only on what you want to create in your life.

      6. LEARN TO MANAGE YOUR NEW RESERVES OF ENERGY. If your box has too much energy, you will fall into old low drama pattern.

      Related Information:

      http://yourattention.mystrikingly.com

      http://splityourattention.mystrikingly.com

      http://thoughtwarepress.mystrikingly.com

      http://distinctionary.mystrikingly.com

      http://pmvillagemaker.mystrikingly.com
      http://hitbottom.mystrikingly.com

      http://yourattention.mystrikingly.com

      http://necessity.mystrikingly.com

      http://archan.mystrikingly.com

      http://worthinghealers.mystrikingly.com

      Related Websites:

      https://spaceport.mystrikingly.com

      Practice Spaces: find all information for these practice spaces at the:

      PM Event Telegram group: https://t.me/pmeventsglobal.

      After listening to this entire recording, please enter Matrix Code: NCRADIO_.__ in your free account at the StartOver.xyz Game. Login here: https://login.startover.xyz

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #123

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-123

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. ASK YOURSELF, WHAT WALL OR CEILING AM I HITTING RIGHT NOW. This is often the place where you are inflexible.

      2. IN YOUR TEAM OF 2 OR 3 PEOPLE, PRACTICE DOING EXPERIMENTS, (reminder from 1st few weeks of this group). This will help you build matrix one step at a time. You must be at the door to take your next step in order to understand it. Stay on the edge of your evolution.

      3. PRACTICE BEING A YES PERSON FOR PEOPLE WHO TELL YOU ABOUT THEIR POSSIBILITIES & PROJECTS.

      4. READ CHAPTER 9 SEVERAL TIMES WITH A GROUP OF MEN & WOMEN. The purpose is to strengthen relationship skills and to build women and menŌĆÖs culture.

      Building Love That Lasts Study Group Week #124

      http://www.nextcultureradio.org/blog/radiant-joy-brilliant-love-week-124

      EXPERIMENTS:

      1. MAKE A CONFESSION ABOUT YOURSELF TO PEOPLE YOU SPEND TIME WITH. Ask them for a penance to practice related to your confession. Practice each day for a week

      2. LOOK AT THE WEBSITE RADICAL RELATING, & START DOING THE EXPERIMENTS MENTIONED.

      3. LOOK AT THE WEBSITES PLAYING FULL OUT, & FLYING SCHOOL. Practice doing the experiments mentioned.

      Clinton and Anne-Chlo├® will not hold space for the Study Group of Radiant Joy Brilliant Love / Building Love That Lasts until May 21. In the mean time, Jeffrey Shub will take over the spaceholding for a Radical Relating Study Group at the same time and day: Tuesdays @11am PDT / @8pm CET / Wednesdays @8am NZT.     • Additional Resources

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play, massively-multiplayer, online-and-offline, thoughtware-upgrade, matrix-building, personal-transformation, adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code BUILD101.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
